pages.title: Meteor Dust
pages.text: Raw dust from cracked meteor rock. Smelt to produce $(item)Meteor Shards$().

pages.title: Meteor Shard
pages.text: The workable ingot-form of meteor metal. Crafts the full $(l:gear)Meteor tool and armor$() set.

pages.title: Meteor Block
pages.text: Nine shards compress into a storage block. Mostly decorative — the dense, refined form of the metal.
